title: Group by Subitem

posts.author: sarahross1011 (Sarah R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We should really have the ability to group by a subitem. I use subitems to record events in a year that pertain to my parent contacts…and I would love to be able to have a view that shows me the whole thing grouped by year. (I tried using the “display on parent” column, but it didn’t know how to handle parent items that had multiple years.)

What are you trying to achieve

Create specific views that are grouped based on data in my subitems.

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: I would find this really useful. We use a board to track our budgets, and subitems denote each payment against the budget (including which quarter it’s being paid in) and I’d like to be able to group by quarter, to see expenditure to date for that quarter.
